name: Beef Barbecue Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, combine the butter or margarine, chili sauce, beer, and sliced stuffed olives.
2. Add the chopped onion to the saucepan.
3. Simmer the mixture for 5 minutes or until the flavors are well blended.
4. Allow the sauce to cool before using. It will make about 1 1/2 cups of sauce.
